description_long: This is a commercial-style front-loading washing machine with a robust, boxy metal exterior finished in a matte light gray color. The front features a large circular black door with a visible handle, set into a flat panel, and above it is a raised control panel with metallic accents. The control panel includes several round buttons and a coin-operated payment mechanism, with the words 'Valiant Wash' prominently displayed in stylized red lettering. The sides and back are plain, with visible screws securing the panels, suggesting a sturdy, industrial build. The top surface is flat and could support small objects, while the overall design is utilitarian and suitable for laundromats or shared urban laundry spaces. The machine's size and construction indicate it is designed for heavy-duty use and frequent operation.
description: A sturdy, front-loading commercial washing machine with a large black door, metallic control panel, and coin-operated payment system, finished in matte light gray.
description_view_0: Side view showing a plain, flat metal panel with visible screws and a protruding control panel at the top rear.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a large, uninterrupted metal panel with a raised section for the control panel on the left.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with the control panel and screws visible, but the door handle is not seen.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the large circular black door, handle, raised metallic control panel with buttons, coin slot, and 'Valiant Wash' branding.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front of the machine, raised above the main body. It features several round buttons, a coin-operated payment slot on the right, and a metallic faceplate with the 'Valiant Wash' label in red script.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading, circular door made of black plastic or coated metal with a visible handle on the right side.
attribute_brand_logo: The brand logo 'Valiant Wash' is visible on the control panel, written in stylized red text.
